mapper.sql: id, role_name, role_code, role_desc, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND del_flag = 0
SELECT r.* FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.del_flag = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND del_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role (role_name, role_code, role_desc, status, del_flag, create_by, remark) VALUES (#{roleName}, #{roleCode}, #{roleDesc}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role SET del_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
